Design.prompt_context: Focus on design decisions, CAD reviews, weight budget, and material selection. Flag any design changes that affect downstream manufacturing.

Prototype.prompt_context: Focus on prototype build issues, assembly problems, and design iterations. Flag anything blocking physical build progress.

Validation.prompt_context: Focus on tolerance approvals, FEA validation results, DVT checklist status, and tooling orders. Flag any sign-offs blocking production.

Pre-production.prompt_context: Focus on tooling confirmation, DFM feedback, and production readiness. Flag any design issues that could impact yield.

Production.prompt_context: Focus on production defects, field failures, and ECO requests. Flag anything requiring immediate design intervention.

Design.prompt_context: Focus on schematic reviews, component selection, and power budget planning. Flag any design decisions affecting PCB layout.

Prototype.prompt_context: Focus on PCB bringup status, debugging progress, and power measurements. Flag any hardware issues blocking firmware development.

Validation.prompt_context: Focus on EMC test results, reliability validation, and DVT checklist completion. Flag any compliance failures requiring redesign.

Pre-production.prompt_context: Focus on production test setup, programming fixtures, and ECO closure. Flag any issues affecting production yield.

Production.prompt_context: Focus on field failures, RMA trends, and production defects. Flag any systemic issues requiring immediate action.

Design.prompt_context: Focus on component availability and lead times during design phase. Flag any components with long lead times or single-source risk.

Prototype.prompt_context: Focus on prototype part procurement and vendor qualification. Flag any supply risks that could delay prototype build.

Validation.prompt_context: Focus on supply chain risks, lead time issues, and alternate sourcing. Flag any parts that could block production ramp.

Pre-production.prompt_context: Focus on BOM finalization, supplier contracts, and inventory build plan. Flag any cost overruns or supply constraints.

Production.prompt_context: Focus on supply continuity and shortage management. Flag any supply disruptions that could halt production.

Design.prompt_context: Focus on team dependencies, milestone tracking, and resource allocation. Flag any blockers slowing design progress.

Prototype.prompt_context: Focus on prototype build schedule and cross-team blockers. Flag any issues requiring escalation or resource reallocation.

Validation.prompt_context: Focus on DVT gate readiness and blocker removal. Flag any risks that could delay the validation gate.

Pre-production.prompt_context: Focus on production readiness and go/no-go decision. Flag any unresolved issues that could delay production start.

Production.prompt_context: Focus on production ramp progress and yield targets. Flag any systemic issues requiring engineering support.

Design.prompt_context: Focus on spec changes and customer requirement alignment. Flag any scope changes that could impact engineering timeline.

Prototype.prompt_context: Focus on prototype feedback and spec compliance. Flag any features that are not meeting customer requirements.

Validation.prompt_context: Focus on launch readiness and customer delivery schedule. Flag any validation issues that could impact customer commitments.

Pre-production.prompt_context: Focus on launch plan execution and customer communication. Flag any production delays that require customer notification.

Production.prompt_context: Focus on customer satisfaction and field feedback. Flag any product issues requiring immediate customer communication.
